entries.historical_thesis: The modern state of Cosmouth emerges from repeated pressure transfer between 6 elite/dynastic actors, 2 institutional actors, and 6 working or local-service actors.
likely_repeating_mechanisms: status converts private preference into durable procedure
wealth cushions some actors while exposing others to debt, delay, and coercive compromise
memory, rumor, and records preserve unequal versions of the same event
local routines harden into institutional expectations when repeated across generations
entries.modern_canon_result: Use Cosmouth modern canon as the visible residue of accumulated choices, not a static given.
entries.validation_note: Do not treat as a replacement historical timeline. Use as explanatory scaffolding.
